title: Shio Ramen Soup
description: A Japanese-inspired shio ramen soup made with a rich pork broth, topped with a soft-boiled egg and sliced pork.

ingredients.name: Pork bones
ingredients.notes: you can also use beef bones

ingredients.name: Pork belly
ingredients.notes: you can also use pork shoulder

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and sauté until fragrant.
Add the pork bones and cook until browned.
Add 2L of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 4 hours.
Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean pot.
Add the shio and stir to combine.
Cook the ramen noodles according to the package instructions.
Slice the pork belly into thin strips.
Cook the pork belly in a pan with a little oil until crispy.
Assemble the ramen by placing the noodles in a bowl, then topping with the pork belly, green onions, and soft-boiled egg.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve.
